item.text: I’ll compute the figures directly from the CSV, then validate both files against the exact structural, wording, and JSON-key constraints.
The dataset has 30 orders totaling $7,154.44. I’m treating the even-order median edge case exactly: the two middle order values are $190.00 and $219.89, whose $204.945 mean rounds to $204.95.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import csv,json,re
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
from pathlib import Path
rows=list(csv.DictReader(open('data/sales.csv')))
revs=[Decimal(r['units'])*Decimal(r['unit_price']) for r in rows]
regions={}
products={}
for r,v in zip(rows,revs):
    regions[r['region']]=regions.get(r['region'],Decimal())+v
    products[r['product']]=products.get(r['product'],Decimal())+v
values=sorted(revs)
expected={'total_revenue':float(sum(revs).quantize(Decimal('.01'))),'orders':len(rows),'median_order_value':float(((values[14]+values[15])/2).quantize(Decimal('.01'),rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)),'top_product_by_revenue':max(products,key=products.get),'revenue_by_region':{k:float(v.quantize(Decimal('.01'))) for k,v in regions.items()}}
actual=json.load(open('summary.json'))
assert actual==expected,(actual,expected)
report=Path('REPORT.md').read_text()
headings=re.findall(r'"'^#+ .+$'"',report,re.M)
assert headings==['## Overview','## Top Products','## Regional Performance','## Recommendations'],headings
assert len(report.split())<=250,len(report.split())
assert not re.search(r'(?i)leverage|delve|robust|seamless|revolutionize',report)
rec=report.split('## Recommendations\\n',1)[1]
bullets=[x for x in rec.splitlines() if x.startswith('- ')]
assert len(bullets)==3
assert all(len(x.split())<=25 for x in bullets),[(len(x.split()),x) for x in bullets]
print('validation passed')
print('report words:',len(report.split()))
print('bullet words:',[len(x.split()) for x in bullets])
print('json:',actual)
PY
nl -ba REPORT.md
nl -ba summary.json"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import csv,json,re
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
from pathlib import Path
rows=list(csv.DictReader(open('data/sales.csv')))
revs=[Decimal(r['units'])*Decimal(r['unit_price']) for r in rows]
regions={}
products={}
for r,v in zip(rows,revs):
    regions[r['region']]=regions.get(r['region'],Decimal())+v
    products[r['product']]=products.get(r['product'],Decimal())+v
values=sorted(revs)
expected={'total_revenue':float(sum(revs).quantize(Decimal('.01'))),'orders':len(rows),'median_order_value':float(((values[14]+values[15])/2).quantize(Decimal('.01'),rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)),'top_product_by_revenue':max(products,key=products.get),'revenue_by_region':{k:float(v.quantize(Decimal('.01'))) for k,v in regions.items()}}
actual=json.load(open('summary.json'))
assert actual==expected,(actual,expected)
report=Path('REPORT.md').read_text()
headings=re.findall(r'"'^#+ .+$'"',report,re.M)
assert headings==['## Overview','## Top Products','## Regional Performance','## Recommendations'],headings
assert len(report.split())<=250,len(report.split())
assert not re.search(r'(?i)leverage|delve|robust|seamless|revolutionize',report)
rec=report.split('## Recommendations\\n',1)[1]
bullets=[x for x in rec.splitlines() if x.startswith('- ')]
assert len(bullets)==3
assert all(len(x.split())<=25 for x in bullets),[(len(x.split()),x) for x in bullets]
print('validation passed')
print('report words:',len(report.split()))
print('bullet words:',[len(x.split()) for x in bullets])
print('json:',actual)
PY
nl -ba REPORT.md
nl -ba summary.json"

item.text:
Created and validated:

- [REPORT.md](/tmp/arena-ws.ZggLOZ/REPORT.md:1)
- [summary.json](/tmp/arena-ws.ZggLOZ/summary.json:1)

The even-count median uses the mean of the two middle orders, rounded to $204.95 ([summary.json](/tmp/arena-ws.ZggLOZ/summary.json:4)).
